extract-pdf-text.title: Extract Text from PDF to UTF-8 Text File
extract-pdf-text.description: Demonstrates how to extract all plain text from a PDF document using PdfExtractor and save it as a UTF‑8 encoded .txt file.

check-pdf-contains-text.title: Check if PDF Contains Any Text via MemoryStream
check-pdf-contains-text.description: Extracts the PDF text to a MemoryStream using PdfExtractor and determines if any text is present by checking the stream length.

batch-extract-pdf-text.title: Batch Extract Text from PDFs to Matching Text Files
batch-extract-pdf-text.description: Processes all PDF files in a folder, extracts their text using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, and saves each result as a .txt file with the same base name.

check-pdf-text-and-images.title: Check if PDF Contains Both Text and Images
check-pdf-text-and-images.description: Demonstrates how to use PdfExtractor to determine whether a PDF file contains any text and any images.

extract-text-and-images.title: Extract Text and Images from PDF using PdfExtractor
extract-text-and-images.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF file with PdfExtractor, enable both text and image extraction, and save the results to files.

extract-text-owner-protected-pdf.title: Extract Text from Owner-Password Protected PDF
extract-text-owner-protected-pdf.description: Shows how to open a PDF encrypted with an owner password and extract its text using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-pdf-text-utf8.title: Extract PDF Text and Save to UTF-8 File
extract-pdf-text-utf8.description: Demonstrates extracting all text from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and writing it to a UTF‑8 encoded text file.

extract-text-from-pdf-byte-array.title: Extract Text from PDF Byte Array using PdfExtractor
extract-text-from-pdf-byte-array.description: Demonstrates how to extract all text from a PDF stored in a byte array using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor without writing any files.

extract-pdf-text-per-page.title: Extract PDF Text Page-by-Page
extract-pdf-text-per-page.description: Extracts text from a PDF and saves each page's content into separate text files using PdfExtractor.

pdfextractor-text-extraction-test.title: Unit Test for PdfExtractor Text Extraction
pdfextractor-text-extraction-test.description: Demonstrates a unit test that creates a PDF, extracts its text using PdfExtractor, and verifies the extracted content.

extract-pdf-text__v2.title: Extract Text from PDF and Print to Console
extract-pdf-text__v2.description: Demonstrates a console application that loads a PDF file, extracts all its text using Aspose.Pdf's TextAbsorber, and writes the result to the console.

extract-pdf-text-to-stringbuilder.title: Extract PDF Text to StringBuilder using Aspose.Pdf
extract-pdf-text-to-stringbuilder.description: Demonstrates extracting all text from a PDF into a StringBuilder for manipulation before saving the result to a text file.

batch-extract-text-pdf.title: Batch Extract Text from PDFs Using PdfExtractor
batch-extract-text-pdf.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract text from every PDF file in a directory and save each as a .txt file.

extract-text-verify.title: Extract Text to File and Verify Content
extract-text-verify.description: Extracts text from a PDF using PdfExtractor, saves it to a file, reads it back, and verifies that the content matches the original extraction.

extract-text-encrypt-aes.title: Extract Text from PDF and Encrypt with AES
extract-text-encrypt-aes.description: Extracts all text from a PDF using PdfExtractor, then encrypts the resulting text file with AES and saves the encrypted data.

determine-pdf-text-only.title: Determine if PDF is Text-Only by Extracting Images
determine-pdf-text-only.description: Extracts all images from a PDF using PdfExtractor and reports whether the document contains any images, indicating if it is text‑only.

extract-pdf-text-to-postgresql.title: Extract PDF Text and Store in PostgreSQL
extract-pdf-text-to-postgresql.description: Extracts all text from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and inserts it into a PostgreSQL table for searchable indexing.

cancel-pdfextractor-extraction.title: Cancel PdfExtractor Extraction with InterruptMonitor
cancel-pdfextractor-extraction.description: Shows how to abort a PdfExtractor operation using an InterruptMonitor and its cancellation token.

extract-text-to-stream.title: Extract PDF Text to MemoryStream and Generate New PDF
extract-text-to-stream.description: Demonstrates extracting text from a PDF into a MemoryStream using PdfExtractor and then creating a new PDF from the extracted text.

azure-function-pdf-text-extraction.title: Scheduled Azure Function to Extract Text from PDFs in Queue
azure-function-pdf-text-extraction.description: An Azure Function triggered by a storage queue that downloads a PDF blob, extracts its text using Aspose.Pdf, and stores the result as a .txt file.

extract-pdf-text-gzip.title: Extract PDF Text to GZip Compressed Stream
extract-pdf-text-gzip.description: Demonstrates extracting all text from a PDF using PdfExtractor and writing it directly to a GZip compressed file to reduce storage size.

batch-extract-pdf-text__v2.title: Batch extract PDF text from Azure Blob storage
batch-extract-pdf-text__v2.description: Downloads PDF files from an Azure Blob container, extracts their text using Aspose.Pdf, and uploads the extracted text back as .txt files.

pdf-diagnostic-count.title: PDF Diagnostic: Count Pages, Images, and Attachments
pdf-diagnostic-count.description: Shows how to count the total pages, embedded images, and file attachments in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

pdf-summary-first-three-pages.title: Create PDF Summary from First Three Pages
pdf-summary-first-three-pages.description: Extracts text from the first three pages of a PDF and creates a new PDF containing that extracted text as a summary.

retry-text-extraction.title: Retry Text Extraction with PdfExtractor
retry-text-extraction.description: Demonstrates how to retry PDF text extraction up to three times when an IOException occurs using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor.

extract-pdf-text__v3.title: Extract Text from PDF to Console
extract-pdf-text__v3.description: Command‑line utility that reads a PDF file and writes its extracted text to standard output.

store-pdf-text-azure-table.title: Store Extracted PDF Text in Azure Table Storage
store-pdf-text-azure-table.description: Extracts all text from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and inserts it into Azure Table storage, using the document name as the partition key.

async-pdf-text-extraction.title: Asynchronous PDF Text Extraction with Aspose.Pdf
async-pdf-text-extraction.description: Demonstrates how to extract text from a PDF file asynchronously using PdfExtractor and async/await to keep the UI responsive.

extract-pdf-text-to-stringwriter.title: Extract PDF Text to StringWriter
extract-pdf-text-to-stringwriter.description: Demonstrates extracting all text from a PDF using TextAbsorber and writing it into a StringWriter, suitable for logging frameworks.

configurable-pdf-extraction.title: Configurable PDF Extraction (Text, Images, Attachments)
configurable-pdf-extraction.description: Shows how to toggle extraction of text, images, and attachments from a PDF using a JSON configuration file without modifying the code.

extract-images-pages-png.title: Extract Images from Specific Pages to PNG
extract-images-pages-png.description: Demonstrates how to configure PdfExtractor to extract images only from pages 5 through 10 of a PDF and save each image as a PNG file.

extract-images-definedinresources.title: Extract Images from PDF Using DefinedInResources Mode
extract-images-definedinresources.description: Demonstrates how to set PdfExtractor.ExtractImageMode to DefinedInResources and extract all resource‑based images from a PDF.

extract-images-first-page.title: Extract Images from First PDF Page to Byte Arrays
extract-images-first-page.description: Demonstrates how to extract all images from the first page of a PDF using PdfExtractor and store each image directly into a byte array for further analysis.

extract-images-bmp.title: Extract Images from PDF and Save as BMP
extract-images-bmp.description: Extracts all images from a PDF file and saves each as a BMP file, preserving the original resolution and color depth.

export-pdf-images-to-jpeg.title: Export PDF Images to JPEG with Quality Setting
export-pdf-images-to-jpeg.description: Extracts each page of a PDF as a JPEG image using PdfConverter, setting the JPEG quality to 85.

extract-images-pdf.title: Extract Images from PDF to Temporary Folder
extract-images-pdf.description: Extracts all images from a PDF using the default extraction mode and saves them to a temporary directory.

extract-images-to-base64.title: Extract Images from PDF and Convert to Base64 Strings
extract-images-to-base64.description: Demonstrates extracting each image from a PDF using PdfExtractor and immediately converting it to a Base64 string for JSON transmission.

extract-single-page.title: Extract Single Page from PDF using PdfFileEditor
extract-single-page.description: Demonstrates how to extract a specific page from a PDF by setting StartPage and EndPage to the same value using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.

extract-images-to-tiff.title: Extract PDF Pages as TIFF Images
extract-images-to-tiff.description: Converts each page of a PDF into a lossless TIFF image using Aspose.Pdf's PdfConverter.

validate-extracted-image-signatures.title: Validate Extracted PDF Images by Checking File Signatures
validate-extracted-image-signatures.description: Extracts images from a PDF, saves them, and verifies each saved image's integrity by checking its file signature (magic number).

parallel-image-extraction.title: Parallel Extraction of Images from Multiple PDFs
parallel-image-extraction.description: Demonstrates how to extract images from several PDF files concurrently using PdfExtractor and Task.WhenAll for improved throughput.

extract-images-to-unc.title: Extract Images from PDF and Save to Network Share (UNC Path)
extract-images-to-unc.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through a PDF, extract each embedded image, and save it to a network share using a UNC path.

extract-text-ignore-images.title: Extract Text from PDF While Ignoring Images
extract-text-ignore-images.description: Demonstrates how to use PdfExtractor to extract only text from a PDF document, configuring it to ignore image extraction.

extract-images-html-report.title: Extract Images from PDF and Embed in HTML Report
extract-images-html-report.description: Demonstrates extracting all images from a PDF using PdfExtractor and embedding them as base64 data URIs in a simple HTML report.

handle-corrupted-pdf-binding.title: Handle Corrupted PDF Binding with PdfExtractor
handle-corrupted-pdf-binding.description: Demonstrates how to catch exceptions when PdfExtractor fails to bind a corrupted PDF file.

extract-pdf-images-to-azure-blob.title: Extract Images from PDF and Upload to Azure Blob Storage
extract-pdf-images-to-azure-blob.description: Demonstrates extracting all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor and uploading them to an Azure Blob container.

extract-images-compress-png.title: Extract Images from PDF and Compress PNGs
extract-images-compress-png.description: Demonstrates extracting images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and then losslessly compressing each PNG with ImageSharp.

extract-images-pdfextractor.title: Extract Images from PDF Using PdfExtractor
extract-images-pdfextractor.description: Demonstrates how to configure PdfExtractor to extract images in their original format from a PDF file.

extract-images-csv-manifest.title: Extract Images from PDF and Create CSV Manifest
extract-images-csv-manifest.description: Extracts all images from a PDF, saves them to files, and generates a CSV file listing each image's file name, page number, and dimensions.

extract-pdf-images-to-s3.title: Extract Images from PDF and Upload to Amazon S3
extract-pdf-images-to-s3.description: Demonstrates extracting each image from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.PdfExtractor and uploading the saved image files to an Amazon S3 bucket.

extract-images-pdf-to-word.title: Extract Images from PDF and Embed into Word Document
extract-images-pdf-to-word.description: Extracts all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and embeds them into a new Word document using the Open XML SDK.

extract-text-with-progress.title: Extract Text from PDF with Progress Reporting
extract-text-with-progress.description: Demonstrates using PdfExtractor to extract text page‑by‑page while reporting progress to the console.

extract-all-images.title: Extract All Images from PDF Using PdfExtractor
extract-all-images.description: Shows how to extract images from every page of a PDF by setting StartPage to 1 and EndPage to 0 with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor.

extract-images-ocr.title: Extract Images from PDF and Perform OCR using Aspose.Pdf AI
extract-images-ocr.description: Extracts all images from a PDF file, saves them as PNG files, and uses Aspose.Pdf AI OCR copilot to recognize hidden text in each image.

list-pdf-attachment-names.title: List Embedded Attachment Names in PDF using PdfExtractor
list-pdf-attachment-names.description: Demonstrates how to use PdfExtractor to retrieve and display the names of all embedded attachments in a PDF without extracting them.

extract-pdf-attachments.title: Extract Attachments from PDF
extract-pdf-attachments.description: Extracts all embedded file attachments from a PDF and saves each attachment to a specified output directory.

extract-rename-attachments.title: Extract and Rename PDF Attachments with Timestamp
extract-rename-attachments.description: Demonstrates how to extract all attachments from a PDF using PdfExtractor, prepend a timestamp to each filename, and save them to disk.

compute-sha256-attachment-hashes.title: Compute SHA-256 Hashes for Extracted PDF Attachments
compute-sha256-attachment-hashes.description: Extracts all attachments from a PDF, saves them to files, and computes a SHA‑256 hash for each saved attachment to verify integrity.

extract-pdf-attachments__v2.title: Extract PDF Attachments and Organize by File Extension
extract-pdf-attachments__v2.description: Extracts all attachments from a PDF using PdfExtractor and saves them into subfolders based on their original file extensions.

verify-image-extraction-mode.title: Verify ImageExtractionMode Influences Extracted Image Count
verify-image-extraction-mode.description: Unit test that checks PdfExtractor.ExtractImageMode correctly changes the number of images extracted from a PDF.

extract-images-guid.title: Extract Images from PDF with GUID Filenames
extract-images-guid.description: Extracts all images from a PDF file and saves each image using a unique GUID filename to avoid naming collisions.

extract-images-zip.title: Extract Images from PDF and Save to ZIP Archive
extract-images-zip.description: Extracts all images from a PDF using PdfExtractor and stores them in a ZIP archive.

extract-images-contact-sheet.title: Extract Images and Create Contact Sheet PDF
extract-images-contact-sheet.description: Extracts all images from a PDF and generates a new PDF that displays the images as thumbnails arranged in a grid.

extract-images-pdf-portfolio.title: Extract Images and Create PDF Portfolio
extract-images-pdf-portfolio.description: Extracts all images from a PDF using PdfExtractor and assembles them into a new PDF where each image appears on its own page.

extract-images-watermark.title: Extract Images from PDF and Apply Watermark
extract-images-watermark.description: Extracts each image from a PDF using PdfExtractor, adds a semi‑transparent text watermark, and saves the watermarked images as PNG files.

extract-images-pdf-json.title: Extract Images from PDF and Output Base64 JSON
extract-images-pdf-json.description: Extracts all images from a PDF, encodes them in Base64, and writes a JSON array with image metadata.

extract-images-csv.title: Extract Images from PDF and Generate CSV Report
extract-images-csv.description: Extracts all images from a PDF, saves them as separate files, and creates a CSV listing each image's filename, page number, and dimensions.

extract-images-sprite-sheet.title: Extract Images from PDF and Create Sprite Sheet PNG
extract-images-sprite-sheet.description: Extracts all images from a PDF using PdfExtractor and combines them into a single sprite sheet PNG.

extract-images-pdfa2b.title: Extract Images and Create PDF/A‑2b Document with XObject Images
extract-images-pdfa2b.description: Extracts all images from a PDF using PdfExtractor, embeds each image as an XObject on separate pages, and saves the result as a PDF/A‑2b compliant document.

extract-pdf-images-to-s3__v2.title: Extract Images from PDF and Upload to Amazon S3 with Server‑Side Encryption
extract-pdf-images-to-s3__v2.description: Demonstrates how to extract all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and upload them to an Amazon S3 bucket with AES‑256 server‑side encryption.

extract-images-unc.title: Extract Images from PDF to UNC Path
extract-images-unc.description: Extracts all images from a PDF file and saves them to a network‑mapped UNC folder.

extract-images-html-gallery.title: Extract Images from PDF and Create HTML Gallery
extract-images-html-gallery.description: Extracts all images from a PDF using PdfExtractor, saves each image as a separate file, and generates an HTML page that displays the images as a simple gallery.

extract-images-video-slideshow.title: Extract Images from PDF and Create Video Slideshow with FFmpeg
extract-images-video-slideshow.description: Extracts all images from a PDF, saves them as PNG files, and uses FFmpeg to generate a video slideshow.

extract-images-to-gcs.title: Extract Images from PDF and Upload to Google Cloud Storage
extract-images-to-gcs.description: Extracts all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and uploads each image to a Google Cloud Storage bucket with public read access.

extract-images-by-keyword.title: Extract Images from Pages Containing a Keyword
extract-images-by-keyword.description: Scans each PDF page for a specific keyword and extracts images only from pages where the keyword is found using PdfExtractor.

extract-text-progress-bar.title: Extract Text from PDF with Progress Bar
extract-text-progress-bar.description: Demonstrates extracting text from each PDF page while showing a console progress bar indicating the percentage of pages processed.

extract-images-markdown-gallery.title: Extract Images and Create Markdown Gallery
extract-images-markdown-gallery.description: Extracts all images from a PDF using PdfExtractor and generates a markdown file with image links for documentation.

extract-pdf-content.title: Extract Text and Images from PDFs Using PdfExtractor
extract-pdf-content.description: A .NET console service that scans a mounted directory for PDF files, extracts their text and images with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, and saves the results as separate files.

extract-pdf-images-thumbnails.title: Extract PDF Images as PNG Thumbnails
extract-pdf-images-thumbnails.description: Extracts all images from a PDF file and saves them as PNG thumbnails with a maximum dimension of 200 pixels.

extract-images-pdf-extractor.title: Extract Images from PDF Using PdfExtractor with Automatic Disposal
extract-images-pdf-extractor.description: Demonstrates how to extract all images from a PDF file using PdfExtractor inside a using block for automatic disposal.

extract-images-encrypted-pdf.title: Extract Images from Encrypted PDF Using Password
extract-images-encrypted-pdf.description: Shows how to provide a user password for an encrypted PDF and extract all images using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor.
